headline: Deckers Outdoor Corp (NYSE:DECK) Shines as a Perfect Peter Lynch Growth-at-a-Reasonable-Price Pick
summary: Deckers Outdoor Corp (NYSE:DECK) meets Peter Lynch’s growth-at-a-reasonable-price criteria with a 0.63 PEG ratio, zero debt, and 40.97% ROE. A strong long-term investment candidate for value-growth investors.
